metadata.description: Concept with confidence = 1.5, which exceeds the valid [0.0, 1.0] range. The schema parses successfully (LibrarianOutput does not enforce confidence range) but the Level 1 check catches it. Fails the confidence_in_range Level 1 check.

concepts.name: TokenVerifier
concepts.description: Validates Supabase-issued JWT tokens by decoding the payload with jose, checking the exp claim against the current UTC timestamp, and verifying the signature against the SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET. Returns the decoded user sub claim on success.
